summary: Abono (Partial Payment) Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend APIs work correctly (12/12 pytest tests passed). Frontend UI works correctly: status dropdown shows 'Agregar Abono' option, payment modal opens with invoice info including totalPaid and balance, payments are registered successfully, and status transitions work (pending→partial→paid).

code_quality.issue: DialogDescription hydration warning - Fixed by using asChild prop

critical_code_review_comments: Invoice status transitions (pending→partial→paid) work correctly based on totalPaid vs total
Quotation restriction (no payments allowed) works correctly
DialogDescription hydration warning fixed by using asChild prop
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ABONO_* invoices for payment testing (auto-deleted by pytest fixtures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Abono feature is fully functional. FAC-005 was fully paid during testing and now shows 'Pagada' status. FAC-003 has partial payments and shows 'Abono' status. Stats update correctly when payments are registered. The DialogDescription hydration warning was fixed by adding asChild prop.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/invoices/{id}/payments: PASS - Adds payment, updates totalPaid, balance, status
backend_api_tests.GET /api/invoices/{id}/payments: PASS - Returns payment history with totals
backend_api_tests.Invoice list with payment info: PASS - List includes totalPaid and balance fields

requirements_met: Allow adding partial payments from invoice status dropdown - VERIFIED
Show payment history and balance - VERIFIED
Update invoice status to 'partial' when payments exist but balance remains - VERIFIED
Auto-mark as 'paid' when balance reaches zero - VERIFIED
